stacked_columns.concept: 3-4 thin vertical photo strips of the SAME image (different crops) stand side by side like sliced repetition.
stacked_columns.visual_hierarchy: Repeated slit-scan strips of the same photo.
stacked_columns.why_different: Repeats the same photo as multiple sliced vertical strips (a slit-scan repetition) — distinct from any single-instance photo template.

vertical_story.concept: Content flows in a single continuous vertical reading path (headline → photo → caption → CTA) with a connecting thin vertical guide line, phone-story optimised.
vertical_story.visual_hierarchy: Single unbroken vertical path with a visible connecting guide line.
vertical_story.text_regions: Top (headline) and bottom (CTA) of the path
vertical_story.why_different: A single unbroken vertical reading path with a literal connecting guide line — an explicit reading-order algorithm made visible.

horizontal_story.concept: The same continuous-reading-path concept as vertical_story, but flowing left-to-right along a horizontal guide line, landscape-optimised.
horizontal_story.visual_hierarchy: Single unbroken horizontal path with a visible connecting guide line.
horizontal_story.text_regions: Left (headline) and right (CTA) of the path
horizontal_story.why_different: The horizontal reading-path equivalent of vertical_story — an orthogonally opposite companion algorithm for landscape formats.

broken_grid.concept: A regular grid is deliberately 'broken' by one element that overflows/breaks out of its assigned cell boundary, creating visual tension.
broken_grid.visual_hierarchy: Regular grid with one rule-breaking overflow element.
broken_grid.why_different: Intentional rule-breaking (one element escapes its grid cell) — a tension/contrast algorithm, the opposite instinct of every orderly grid template.

fragment_layout.concept: The photo appears shattered into 4-5 irregular polygon fragments with small gaps between them (like broken glass), reassembled with slight offsets.
fragment_layout.visual_hierarchy: Fragmented polygon pieces of the photo with visible gaps.
fragment_layout.why_different: The photo itself is fragmented into irregular polygon pieces with gaps — a deconstruction algorithm unlike any single-mask template.

negative_blocks.concept: Solid-colour blocks are cut OUT of the photo (punching holes to reveal a colour field behind), the inverse of a normal photo-on-background composition.
negative_blocks.visual_hierarchy: Photo with subtractive cut-out holes revealing colour beneath.
negative_blocks.why_different: Colour blocks remove parts of the photo (negative/subtractive masking) rather than adding on top — an inverse figure-ground algorithm.

mask_layers.concept: 3 semi-transparent shape masks (circle, triangle, rectangle) overlap at different opacities across the photo, creating a layered Venn-like composition.
mask_layers.visual_hierarchy: Multiple overlapping semi-transparent shape masks at varied opacity.
mask_layers.image_regions: Visible through each mask shape differently
mask_layers.text_regions: In the densest overlap zone or outside all masks
mask_layers.why_different: Multiple overlapping semi-transparent shape masks of different geometries simultaneously — a compound-mask algorithm distinct from any single-shape mask.

pixel_frame.concept: The photo's border dissolves into visible pixelation/mosaic blocks that gradually increase in size toward the edge.
pixel_frame.visual_hierarchy: Sharp photo centre degrading into larger pixel blocks toward the edge.
pixel_frame.why_different: A gradient pixelation effect (blocks increasing in size toward the edge) — a resolution-degradation algorithm unique to this template.

floating_numbers.concept: Large translucent numerals in a scattered sequence (1-2-3) float at different positions/sizes across the photo, rather than one static numeral.
floating_numbers.visual_hierarchy: Scattered sequence of translucent numbers at varied scale.
floating_numbers.why_different: A scattered sequence of numbers at varied position/scale (not one static numeral like numbered_print) — implies counting/sequence across the frame.

caption_cloud.concept: Several short caption fragments (single words/short phrases) scatter in a loose 'word cloud' arrangement of varying sizes across the photo.
caption_cloud.visual_hierarchy: Distributed word-cloud fragments of varying scale.
caption_cloud.why_different: A word cloud (multiple independent text fragments at varying scale) rather than one coherent caption sentence — a distributed-text algorithm.

outline_focus.concept: The photo is rendered mostly as a soft, desaturated wash with ONE specific object/detail rendered in full sharp outline/contour, everything else soft.
outline_focus.visual_hierarchy: Soft desaturated field with one sharply outlined focal detail.
decorative_elements: selective sharp-contour outline on one detail
outline_focus.why_different: Selective sharpness (one contour-outlined detail against an entirely soft/desaturated field) — a focus-isolation algorithm distinct from any texture or crop-based device.

museum_label_caption.name: Museum Label
museum_label_caption.concept: Artwork-style presentation with a small caption tag, as if the photo were an exhibited piece.
museum_label_caption.layout_description: Photo generously matted, small rectangular label plate beneath it carrying title/medium-style caption text in tracked caps.
museum_label_caption.why_unique: Presents the work as a curated exhibit piece rather than a social post — the label plate is the caption device.

gallery_wall.name: Gallery Wall
gallery_wall.concept: Multiple framed images arranged like an exhibition wall.
gallery_wall.layout_description: Two or three thinly framed image panels of varying size arranged asymmetrically on a flat wall-colour field, generous gaps between frames.
gallery_wall.why_unique: Simulates a physical exhibition hang rather than a single photo or split — plural framed objects on a wall.

fine_art_frame.name: Fine Art Frame
fine_art_frame.concept: Thick premium border with generous, deliberate spacing around the photo.
fine_art_frame.layout_description: Wide flat-colour mat (heavier than a standard border) surrounds the photo, caption sits in the lower mat area in small serif type.
fine_art_frame.why_unique: The mat weight itself is the luxury signal — an oversized frame proportion rather than a thin hairline border.

designer_portfolio.name: Designer Portfolio
designer_portfolio.concept: Clean portfolio sheet layout as if presenting a single piece of work.
designer_portfolio.layout_description: Photo aligned to one side on a flat field, small project-style metadata block (title, category, year) opposite it in a tight column.
designer_portfolio.why_unique: Reads as a portfolio case study page rather than a promotional card — metadata block, not a caption.

fashion_editorial.name: Fashion Editorial
fashion_editorial.concept: Magazine-inspired full-bleed composition with restrained typography.
fashion_editorial.layout_description: Full-bleed photo, single line of tracked-cap text low on the frame, no card or panel breaking the image.
fashion_editorial.why_unique: Pure full-bleed with no structural device at all — the restraint itself is the differentiator.

vogue_white_space.name: Vogue White Space
vogue_white_space.concept: Large negative space with elegant, deliberate typography.
vogue_white_space.layout_description: Photo occupies a fraction of the canvas, the remainder is a flat pale field carrying a single elegant headline set small and precise.
vogue_white_space.why_unique: Negative space is the majority of the canvas, not a margin — the photo is the accent, not the subject of the layout.

monochrome_editorial.name: Monochrome Editorial
monochrome_editorial.concept: Single-tone luxury styling across the whole composition.
monochrome_editorial.layout_description: Photo and background rendered in one restrained tonal family, thin single-weight rule separates a caption strip at the bottom.
monochrome_editorial.why_unique: Tonal unification (photo and field share one hue family) rather than a duotone filter or colour block.

luxury_lookbook.name: Luxury Lookbook
luxury_lookbook.concept: Curated collection showcase presenting the work as a seasonal edit.
luxury_lookbook.layout_description: Photo inset with a slim vertical edge column carrying a short curated list (2-3 lines) of related items or looks.
luxury_lookbook.why_unique: The edge column reads as a curated edit list, not a caption or metadata block.

signature_margin.name: Signature Margin
signature_margin.concept: Asymmetrical margins give the composition an editorial, hand-set feel.
signature_margin.layout_description: Photo pushed hard to one edge with a wide asymmetric margin on the opposite side carrying a short flush-left caption.
signature_margin.why_unique: Margins are deliberately unequal on purpose (not a centred mat) — an editorial page-layout convention.

premium_catalog.name: Premium Catalog
premium_catalog.concept: Product/service catalog presentation with restrained pricing-page styling.
premium_catalog.layout_description: Photo inset top, thin rule below separates a small catalog-style detail row (name, short descriptor) in the manner of a print catalog entry.
premium_catalog.why_unique: Catalog-entry convention (photo plus a single detail row) rather than a full caption card.

glass_grid.name: Glass Grid
glass_grid.concept: Translucent glass-like panels divide the composition.
glass_grid.layout_description: Photo sits behind a set of thin translucent panel outlines forming an irregular grid, one panel slightly tinted to hold the caption.
glass_grid.why_unique: Panels are translucent structural outlines, not opaque cards — the grid reads as glass, not paper.

floating_panel_stack.name: Floating Panels
floating_panel_stack.concept: Layered cards with visible depth stack above the base photo.
floating_panel_stack.layout_description: Two or three small rectangular panels with soft drop shadows overlap at staggered depths above the full-bleed photo, one carries the caption.
floating_panel_stack.why_unique: Depth is expressed through layered shadow stacking rather than a single flat card.

offset_windows.name: Offset Windows
offset_windows.concept: Staggered image windows break the photo into offset rectangles.
offset_windows.layout_description: Photo divided into two or three unequal rectangular windows offset from a shared grid line, thin gaps between them.
offset_windows.why_unique: Windows are deliberately offset from alignment rather than a clean split or repeating grid.

modern_blueprint.name: Modern Blueprint
modern_blueprint.concept: Structured technical grid gives the composition a drafting-table feel.
modern_blueprint.layout_description: Faint fine grid lines run across the full canvas, photo inset on-grid, small technical-style caption label bottom corner.
modern_blueprint.why_unique: The grid is a visible technical drafting reference, not a hidden alignment aid.

perspective_blocks.name: Perspective Blocks
perspective_blocks.concept: Angled geometric sections suggest architectural perspective.
perspective_blocks.layout_description: Canvas split by one or two diagonal lines into angled trapezoidal sections, photo fills the largest section, caption in a smaller angled block.
perspective_blocks.why_unique: Sections are angled/trapezoidal rather than rectangular — implies depth and perspective, not a flat split.

skyline_layout.name: Skyline Layout
skyline_layout.concept: Tall vertical composition evokes a skyline silhouette.
skyline_layout.layout_description: Photo cropped tall and narrow, flanked by two slim vertical bands of varying height suggesting a skyline silhouette, caption low.
skyline_layout.why_unique: The flanking bands are proportioned like a skyline silhouette, not decorative borders.

vertical_architecture.name: Vertical Architecture
vertical_architecture.layout_description: Photo stacked between two thin horizontal structural lines top and bottom, tall column proportions, caption set vertically along one edge.
vertical_architecture.why_unique: Verticality is structural (stacked framing lines), not achieved through crop alone.

concrete_geometry.name: Concrete Geometry
concrete_geometry.concept: Bold rectangular divisions in a muted concrete palette.
concrete_geometry.layout_description: Canvas divided into two or three bold flat rectangular blocks in muted grey/stone tones, photo in the largest block.
concrete_geometry.why_unique: Palette and block weight evoke poured concrete rather than paper or card divisions.

window_cutouts.name: Window Cutouts
window_cutouts.concept: Peek-through image frames reveal the photo through cut shapes.
window_cutouts.layout_description: Solid colour field with one or two rectangular cutout windows revealing fragments of the photo beneath, rest of the photo hidden.
window_cutouts.why_unique: The photo is only ever seen through cutout apertures — never displayed whole.

floating_cards.name: Floating Cards
floating_cards.concept: Detached card-style elements hover independently over the photo.
floating_cards.layout_description: Full-bleed photo with one small detached rounded card floating with a soft shadow, entirely separate from any border or edge.
floating_cards.why_unique: The card is fully detached from the canvas edges (floating mid-frame), not anchored to a corner or edge.

organic_layers.name: Organic Layers
organic_layers.concept: Flowing overlapping shapes give the composition a soft, layered feel.
organic_layers.layout_description: Two or three soft irregular organic shapes overlap semi-transparently across the photo, caption nested in the calmest overlap area.
organic_layers.why_unique: Shapes are freeform organic outlines, not geometric blocks or circles.

soft_blob_composition.name: Soft Blob Composition
soft_blob_composition.concept: Rounded abstract sections replace hard rectangular divisions.
soft_blob_composition.layout_description: Canvas divided by one large soft blob shape (rounded, asymmetric) rather than a straight line, photo fills the blob, caption sits outside it.
soft_blob_composition.why_unique: The division mechanic is a single rounded blob silhouette, not a mask, circle, or rectangle.

watercolor_frame.name: Watercolor Frame
watercolor_frame.concept: Soft painted border effect surrounds the photo.
watercolor_frame.layout_description: Photo edges fade into a soft irregular watercolour-wash border with visible pigment bleed texture, caption in the wash area.
watercolor_frame.why_unique: The border edge is a painted bleed texture, not a hard line, mat, or vector frame.

botanical_border.name: Botanical Border
botanical_border.concept: Leaf-inspired framing traces the photo edge.
botanical_border.layout_description: Fine botanical line-illustration (leaves/stems) traces along one or two edges of the photo, caption nested among the foliage line work.
botanical_border.why_unique: The framing motif is illustrated botanical linework, not a geometric or material border.

leaf_shadow_layout.name: Leaf Shadow Layout
leaf_shadow_layout.concept: Subtle natural shadows suggest dappled light through foliage.
leaf_shadow_layout.layout_description: Faint leaf-shaped shadow shapes fall softly across part of the photo as if from natural light through plants, caption sits outside the shadow area.
leaf_shadow_layout.why_unique: The decorative device is a lighting effect (cast shadow), not a printed shape or overlay graphic.

linen_texture.name: Linen Texture
linen_texture.concept: Fabric-inspired premium background gives quiet tactile warmth.
linen_texture.layout_description: Photo inset on a visible woven-linen texture field, caption set directly on the linen in small serif type.
linen_texture.why_unique: The field itself carries a woven fabric texture rather than a flat colour or paper grain.

handmade_paper.name: Handmade Paper
handmade_paper.concept: Artisanal paper feel with a deckled, uneven edge.
handmade_paper.layout_description: Photo inset within a field showing visible deckled/torn paper-edge texture and faint fibre flecks, caption below in a hand-set serif.
handmade_paper.why_unique: The edge is an irregular handmade deckle, not a clean cut border or mat.

natural_canvas.name: Natural Canvas
natural_canvas.concept: Textured minimal surface evokes raw canvas cloth.
natural_canvas.layout_description: Photo inset on a visible woven-canvas texture field with a slightly irregular hand-set caption placement, no hard structural lines.
natural_canvas.why_unique: Texture and slight irregularity replace any grid or alignment system entirely.

earth_tone_editorial.name: Earth Tone Editorial
earth_tone_editorial.concept: Warm muted palette layout in clay, sand, and stone tones.
earth_tone_editorial.layout_description: Photo lightly tinted toward a warm earth palette, generous flat earth-tone margin carries the caption in a soft serif.
earth_tone_editorial.why_unique: The palette shift itself (toward clay/sand/stone) is the device, applied consistently to both photo and field.

pebble_composition.name: Pebble Composition
pebble_composition.concept: Smooth rounded placements suggest arranged river pebbles.
pebble_composition.layout_description: Two or three small rounded-rectangle elements of varying size are arranged loosely like pebbles beneath the main photo, one holds the caption.
pebble_composition.why_unique: Element arrangement follows an organic scattered-pebble logic rather than a grid or stack.

gold_foil_accent.name: Gold Foil Accent
gold_foil_accent.concept: Metallic highlight styling traces a single premium accent line.
gold_foil_accent.layout_description: Photo full-bleed or lightly inset, one fine metallic-gold line or small foil motif accents a corner or edge, caption set nearby in a thin serif.
gold_foil_accent.why_unique: The metallic accent is a single restrained line/motif, not a full foil border or heavy embellishment.

embossed_card.name: Embossed Card
embossed_card.concept: Raised-paper luxury effect gives the caption card a tactile quality.
embossed_card.layout_description: Photo full-bleed, small caption card with a soft emboss/deboss shadow effect (not flat colour) sits in a lower corner.
embossed_card.why_unique: The card reads as physically raised/pressed paper via soft directional shading, not a flat rounded rectangle.

matte_black_layout.name: Matte Black Layout
matte_black_layout.concept: Dark premium aesthetic with a matte black field.
matte_black_layout.layout_description: Photo inset on a deep matte-black field, caption in a fine light-weight sans, single thin light-toned rule beneath it.
matte_black_layout.why_unique: The near-black field itself is the luxury signal, distinct from any lighter duotone or scrim treatment.

champagne_minimal.name: Champagne Minimal
champagne_minimal.concept: Soft gold minimalism with a pale champagne palette.
champagne_minimal.layout_description: Photo inset generously on a pale champagne-toned field, one thin gold hairline separates the caption area, nothing else on the canvas.
champagne_minimal.why_unique: Extreme restraint (one hairline only) paired with a specific champagne palette, not a bordered or scrimmed treatment.

luxury_ribbon.name: Luxury Ribbon
luxury_ribbon.concept: Elegant ribbon separators divide the composition like gift packaging.
luxury_ribbon.layout_description: A thin ribbon-like band crosses one corner or edge of the full-bleed photo, small caption sits just beneath the ribbon.
luxury_ribbon.why_unique: The ribbon is a packaging-style diagonal band, not a straight rule or scrim.

boutique_showcase.name: Boutique Showcase
boutique_showcase.concept: High-end brand presentation as if displayed in a boutique window.
boutique_showcase.layout_description: Photo inset within a generous flat-colour field bordered by a very thin frame line, small brand-name label centred beneath like a shop plaque.
boutique_showcase.why_unique: The plaque-style label beneath centres the brand name as if it were a boutique signage element.

premium_brand_sheet.name: Premium Brand Sheet
premium_brand_sheet.concept: Identity-focused composition presenting the work like a brand guideline sheet.
premium_brand_sheet.layout_description: Photo occupies one zone, adjacent zone carries a small brand-mark and one line of positioning text, thin divider rule between zones.
premium_brand_sheet.why_unique: Reads as a brand identity spec sheet (mark plus positioning line), not a promotional caption.

elegant_invitation.name: Elegant Invitation
elegant_invitation.layout_description: Photo inset within a generous pale card field with a fine border rule, caption centred in a formal serif as if reading an invitation.
elegant_invitation.why_unique: Typographic centring and formal serif treatment specifically evoke a printed invitation card.

luxury_collection.name: Luxury Collection
luxury_collection.layout_description: Photo inset top with a slim horizontal strip beneath carrying two or three small tonal swatches representing a collection range.
luxury_collection.why_unique: The swatch strip implies a broader curated range rather than describing the single photo.

designer_identity.name: Designer Identity
designer_identity.concept: Fashion-brand inspired layout foregrounding the maker's name.
designer_identity.layout_description: Photo inset with the brand or technician name set very large in a fashion-house wordmark style along one edge, small caption beneath it.
designer_identity.why_unique: The name itself, set oversized, is the primary graphic device rather than the photo or a caption.

before_journey.name: Before Journey
before_journey.concept: Before/after presentation with a narrative flow rather than a hard split.
before_journey.layout_description: Before image faded/smaller in one corner leading into the larger after photo, a thin arrow or path line connects them.
before_journey.why_unique: The connecting path line implies a journey/sequence rather than a symmetrical side-by-side split.

transformation_timeline.name: Transformation Timeline
transformation_timeline.concept: Chronological progress layout across a visible timeline.
transformation_timeline.layout_description: A thin horizontal timeline line runs across the lower third with two or three small markers representing stages, main photo above it.
transformation_timeline.why_unique: Progress is expressed via an explicit timeline axis with stage markers, not a before/after pair.

client_spotlight.name: Client Spotlight
client_spotlight.concept: Hero portrait treatment paired with a short quote.
client_spotlight.layout_description: Photo full-bleed or lightly inset, a short quote line sits in generous negative space with a small attribution line beneath it.
client_spotlight.why_unique: The quote is attributed and freestanding (not inside a speech-bubble card), reading as an editorial pull-quote.

testimonial_focus.name: Testimonial Focus
testimonial_focus.concept: Review-first composition where the words lead and the photo supports.
testimonial_focus.layout_description: Testimonial text set large and central, small photo inset in a corner as supporting evidence rather than the main subject.
testimonial_focus.why_unique: Text is the dominant element and the photo is demoted to a corner accent — an inversion of the usual photo-led hierarchy.

experience_story.name: Experience Story
experience_story.concept: Emotional storytelling sequence across a soft narrative field.
experience_story.layout_description: Photo inset with a short multi-line narrative caption (2-3 short sentences) set in generous leading beneath it, quiet pacing.
experience_story.why_unique: The caption is a short narrative passage rather than a single hook line or tag.

behind_the_chair.name: Behind The Chair
behind_the_chair.concept: Stylist/process feature framing the professional at work.
behind_the_chair.layout_description: Photo full-bleed, small process-note label in a corner naming the technique or step being shown, understated caption below.
behind_the_chair.why_unique: The corner label names a specific technique/process, framing the photo as documentation of a skill in progress.

treatment_journey_steps.name: Treatment Journey
treatment_journey_steps.concept: Step-by-step treatment visuals presented as a numbered sequence.
treatment_journey_steps.layout_description: Photo inset with two or three small numbered step tags arranged along one edge, each with a short label describing that stage.
treatment_journey_steps.why_unique: Numbered step tags describe a multi-stage process attached to a single photo, not a full grid of separate images.

step_reveal.name: Step Reveal
step_reveal.concept: Staged reveal panels suggest progressive disclosure.
step_reveal.layout_description: Photo partially masked by one or two overlapping panel shapes that appear to be sliding away, revealing the image beneath.
step_reveal.why_unique: Panels imply a reveal-in-progress moment, not a static split or window cutout.

process_narrative.name: Process Narrative
process_narrative.concept: Instructional story flow guiding the eye through a sequence.
process_narrative.layout_description: Photo inset with a thin dotted guide line leading from a small numeral to the caption text, instructional-diagram pacing.
process_narrative.why_unique: The dotted guide line explicitly sequences numeral-to-caption as an instructional reading path.

customer_moment.name: Customer Moment
customer_moment.concept: Candid client highlight capturing a genuine in-the-moment feel.
customer_moment.layout_description: Photo full-bleed with minimal intervention, a small timestamp-style caption tag sits unobtrusively in one corner.
customer_moment.why_unique: Minimal styling and a timestamp-style tag lean into candour rather than polish.

runway_layout.name: Runway Layout
runway_layout.concept: Fashion show inspired composition with a walk-length frame.
runway_layout.layout_description: Photo cropped tall like a runway walk shot, small look-number tag in a corner, caption set in condensed tracked caps low on the frame.
runway_layout.why_unique: The tall runway-walk crop and look-number tag are borrowed directly from show photography conventions.

model_card.name: Model Card
model_card.layout_description: Photo inset with a slim side column of small stat-style labels (name, category, measurements-style rows) beside it, comp-card styling.
model_card.why_unique: The stat-row side column specifically replicates agency comp-card formatting.

fashion_strip.name: Fashion Strip
fashion_strip.concept: Vertical runway frames arranged as a narrow filmstrip.
fashion_strip.layout_description: Photo cropped into a tall narrow vertical strip flanked by thin dark margin bands on either side, minimal caption at the base.
fashion_strip.why_unique: Extreme narrow vertical cropping (filmstrip proportions) rather than a standard frame ratio.

couture_spread.name: Couture Spread
couture_spread.concept: Luxury fashion spread with generous editorial breathing room.
couture_spread.layout_description: Photo occupies roughly two-thirds of the canvas, remaining third is a flat field carrying a single refined caption line.
couture_spread.why_unique: The two-thirds/one-third division specifically mimics a magazine double-page spread ratio, not a symmetric split.

editorial_cover.name: Editorial Cover
editorial_cover.concept: Magazine cover treatment with masthead-style hierarchy.
editorial_cover.layout_description: Full-bleed photo, small masthead-style wordmark along the top edge, one bold cover-line headline low on the frame.
editorial_cover.why_unique: The masthead-plus-coverline hierarchy specifically references a magazine cover, not a poster or banner.

fashion_collection_sheet.name: Collection Sheet
fashion_collection_sheet.concept: Collection showcase grid presenting the work as part of a range.
fashion_collection_sheet.layout_description: Main photo larger on one side, two or three small thumbnail-scale swatch images arranged in a tight column beside it.
fashion_collection_sheet.why_unique: Small companion thumbnails alongside the hero photo imply a fuller collection, not a single-image caption.

campaign_layout.name: Campaign Layout
campaign_layout.concept: Ad-campaign composition with bold, confident typography.
campaign_layout.layout_description: Full-bleed photo, one large bold campaign-style headline set low with generous letter-spacing, small brand tag opposite it.
campaign_layout.why_unique: Typography weight and confidence (bold, spaced, campaign-scale) is the primary device, not a card or panel.

lookbook_fold.name: Lookbook Fold
lookbook_fold.concept: Folded booklet appearance simulating a physical lookbook page.
lookbook_fold.layout_description: Photo split by a faint centre-fold shadow line into two unequal panels, caption in the smaller panel like a booklet page.
lookbook_fold.why_unique: The fold shadow specifically implies a bound booklet page, distinct from a gutter-spread or hard split.

portfolio_sheet.name: Portfolio Sheet
portfolio_sheet.concept: Creative portfolio arrangement presenting the work as a case study.
portfolio_sheet.layout_description: Photo inset with a small project-index number and one-line descriptor beneath it in a tight, precise sans.
portfolio_sheet.why_unique: The index number and descriptor read as a portfolio catalogue entry rather than a caption.

fashion_frame.name: Fashion Frame
fashion_frame.concept: Elegant runway framing with a refined thin border.
fashion_frame.layout_description: Photo inset within a slim precise border, small tracked-caps tag centred beneath it in the manner of a show program.
fashion_frame.why_unique: Border proportion and centred show-program-style tag distinguish it from the gallery mat treatments elsewhere.

glassmorphism_elite.name: Glassmorphism Elite
glassmorphism_elite.concept: Frosted premium UI card floats above the photo.
glassmorphism_elite.layout_description: Full-bleed photo with one frosted translucent glass-effect card (blurred backdrop, soft border) holding the caption.
glassmorphism_elite.why_unique: The card simulates true frosted-glass blur/translucency, distinct from a flat solid or scrim panel.

frosted_ui.name: Frosted UI
frosted_ui.concept: Blurred translucent cards arranged like a modern app interface.
frosted_ui.layout_description: Two small frosted translucent panels of different sizes overlap slightly above the photo, one for caption, one left empty as a UI accent.
frosted_ui.why_unique: Multiple frosted panels overlapping mimics layered app UI cards rather than a single caption card.

smart_dashboard.name: Smart Dashboard
smart_dashboard.concept: Data-inspired layout presenting the work like a dashboard tile.
smart_dashboard.layout_description: Photo inset in one tile, adjacent small tiles carry minimal stat-style numerals or short labels, thin grid lines separate tiles.
smart_dashboard.why_unique: Multiple small data-tile elements around the photo simulate a dashboard interface, not a single stat card.

floating_interface.name: Floating Interface
floating_interface.concept: Hovering UI elements suggest a spatial interface above the photo.
floating_interface.layout_description: Full-bleed photo with two or three small pill-shaped UI chips floating at different depths with soft shadows, one holds the caption.
floating_interface.why_unique: Multiple independently floating pill elements at varied depth, not one anchored card.

premium_widgets.name: Premium Widgets
premium_widgets.concept: Modular information cards arranged like home-screen widgets.
premium_widgets.layout_description: Photo in one rounded widget module, one or two smaller rounded modules beside it carrying short label text, consistent corner radius throughout.
premium_widgets.why_unique: Consistent widget-style corner radius and modularity across multiple tiles, not a single frame.

digital_layers.name: Digital Layers
digital_layers.concept: Stacked interface sections imply a layered digital composition.
digital_layers.layout_description: Photo sits beneath two thin semi-transparent horizontal bands at different opacities stacked near the base, caption on the top band.
digital_layers.why_unique: Layer stacking uses varied transparency levels to imply digital depth, distinct from a single scrim.

visionos_style.name: VisionOS Style
visionos_style.concept: Spatial computing aesthetic with soft depth and rounded glass panels.
visionos_style.layout_description: Full-bleed photo with one large rounded glass-effect panel gently offset from centre, soft ambient shadow beneath it for spatial depth.
visionos_style.why_unique: Ambient spatial shadow and rounded glass panel specifically evoke spatial-computing interface design.

neon_glass.name: Neon Glass
neon_glass.concept: Glowing glass accents add a futuristic edge highlight.
neon_glass.layout_description: Photo full-bleed, one thin glowing accent line traces an edge or panel outline in a saturated brand-colour glow, caption nearby.
neon_glass.why_unique: The glow is a luminous edge-light effect, not a flat coloured line or scrim.

ai_dashboard.name: AI Dashboard
ai_dashboard.concept: Futuristic panel composition suggesting an intelligent interface.
ai_dashboard.layout_description: Photo inset with a slim side panel carrying two or three minimal iconographic markers and short label text, fine connecting lines between them.
ai_dashboard.why_unique: Iconographic markers with connecting lines simulate an analysis/interface readout, not a caption card.

interactive_blocks.name: Interactive Blocks
interactive_blocks.concept: App-like modular layout built from discrete tappable-looking blocks.
interactive_blocks.layout_description: Canvas divided into three or four small rounded rectangular blocks of even weight, photo in the largest, others carry short labels.
interactive_blocks.why_unique: Even-weighted rounded blocks specifically resemble tappable app tiles rather than an editorial grid.

double_page_spread.name: Double Page Spread
double_page_spread.concept: Two-page editorial look simulating an open magazine spread.
double_page_spread.layout_description: Canvas split by a faint centre-gutter line into two halves, photo spans both with a slight tonal shift across the gutter, caption on one half.
double_page_spread.why_unique: The gutter line implies two printed pages meeting, not a hard split or fold shadow.

corner_caption.name: Corner Caption
corner_caption.concept: Minimal corner storytelling with a small, quiet caption placement.
corner_caption.layout_description: Full-bleed photo, small caption confined entirely to one corner in a compact block, rest of the frame untouched.
corner_caption.why_unique: Extreme restraint — caption occupies only one small corner, nothing else added to the frame.

pull_quote_layout.name: Pull Quote Layout
pull_quote_layout.concept: Oversized quote feature dominates the composition.
pull_quote_layout.layout_description: Large pull-quote text set oversized across the centre of the frame with the photo visible behind it at reduced opacity.
pull_quote_layout.why_unique: The quote is oversized and dominant with the photo demoted to a backdrop, an explicit pull-quote convention.

editorial_notes.name: Editorial Notes
editorial_notes.concept: Handwritten annotation style adds a personal editorial layer.
editorial_notes.layout_description: Photo inset with one small handwritten-style annotation and a thin connecting line pointing to a detail in the photo.
editorial_notes.why_unique: The annotation is handwritten-style and pointed at a specific detail, like a margin note on a proof.

magazine_fold.name: Magazine Fold
magazine_fold.concept: Folded print illusion suggesting a physical folded page.
magazine_fold.layout_description: A soft diagonal fold-crease shadow crosses one corner of the full-bleed photo as if the page were folded back slightly.
magazine_fold.why_unique: The fold is a corner-specific diagonal crease, distinct from the centre-gutter fold used elsewhere.

magazine_cover_story.name: Cover Story
magazine_cover_story.concept: Headline-driven hero treatment leading with a bold cover line.
magazine_cover_story.layout_description: Full-bleed photo, one dominant headline set large near the top, small supporting deck line beneath it, cover-story hierarchy.
magazine_cover_story.why_unique: Headline-first hierarchy with a supporting deck line beneath, rather than a caption at the base.

feature_spread.name: Feature Spread
feature_spread.concept: Feature article structure with a clear lead-in and body caption.
feature_spread.layout_description: Photo occupies the upper portion, a short multi-line body caption sits beneath it in column-width text like an article opener.
feature_spread.why_unique: Column-width body text beneath the photo specifically simulates an article lead-in, not a short tag.

side_notes.name: Side Notes
side_notes.concept: Margin note accents run alongside the main image.
side_notes.layout_description: Photo occupies most of the frame, a slim margin strip along one edge carries two or three short annotation-style notes.
side_notes.why_unique: Multiple short margin notes along one edge, rather than a single caption block.

interview_layout.name: Interview Layout
interview_layout.concept: Q&A inspired design presenting a short question-and-answer exchange.
interview_layout.layout_description: Photo inset with a short two-line Q&A style text block beneath it, question in bold, answer in regular weight.
interview_layout.why_unique: The bold-question/regular-answer pairing specifically mimics a printed interview excerpt.

column_editorial.name: Column Editorial
column_editorial.layout_description: Canvas divided into two or three narrow vertical text-column widths, photo occupies one column width, caption text in an adjacent column.
column_editorial.why_unique: Column-width discipline (newspaper layout logic) applied to a luxury palette, not a free-form split.

reel_thumbnail.name: Reel Thumbnail
reel_thumbnail.concept: Video-cover optimized composition for reel/video thumbnails.
reel_thumbnail.layout_description: Tall 9:16 full-bleed photo with a small centred play-button glyph and a short bold title low on the frame.
reel_thumbnail.why_unique: The play-button glyph explicitly signals video content, unlike any static-post template.

swipe_preview.name: Swipe Preview
swipe_preview.concept: Carousel teaser layout hinting at more slides to come.
swipe_preview.layout_description: Main photo full-bleed with a slim sliver of a second image peeking from one edge and small dot-indicator markers at the base.
swipe_preview.why_unique: The peeking sliver and dot indicators explicitly imply additional swipeable slides.

story_highlights.name: Story Highlights
story_highlights.concept: Story-circle inspired framing referencing highlight covers.
story_highlights.layout_description: Photo masked into a circle with a thin gradient ring around it, small label centred beneath the circle like a highlight cover.
story_highlights.why_unique: The gradient ring specifically references the story-highlight circle convention, not a plain circle mask.

carousel_hero.name: Carousel Hero
carousel_hero.concept: Strong first-slide focus designed to stop the scroll.
carousel_hero.layout_description: Full-bleed photo with one bold short hook phrase set large near the centre, minimal else on the frame, first-slide pacing.
carousel_hero.why_unique: Deliberately minimal with one oversized hook phrase, optimised as a scroll-stopping opener rather than a full caption.

grid_harmony.name: Grid Harmony
grid_harmony.concept: Feed-grid continuity treatment that reads well alongside a 3-column grid.
grid_harmony.layout_description: Photo lightly tinted toward a consistent brand tone with a thin uniform border matched to a repeating grid module size.
grid_harmony.why_unique: Designed for visual consistency across a repeating feed grid rather than as a standalone composition.

story_window.name: Story Window
story_window.concept: Vertical story framing built for the 9:16 story canvas.
story_window.layout_description: Tall photo inset within generous top/bottom safe-zone margins for story UI, small caption sits in the lower safe zone.
story_window.why_unique: Explicitly reserves top/bottom safe zones for platform UI overlap, unlike a standard feed template.

feed_preview.name: Feed Preview
feed_preview.concept: Instagram-feed mockup styling with a subtle interface frame.
feed_preview.layout_description: Photo inset within a thin rounded-corner device-style frame, small icon row (heart/comment style glyphs) faintly suggested at the base.
feed_preview.why_unique: A faint suggested interface chrome frames the photo, evoking the feed environment itself.

trending_card.name: Trending Card
trending_card.concept: Viral-style information card with bold, punchy hierarchy.
trending_card.layout_description: Photo inset top, bold short label bar beneath in a saturated brand colour, high-contrast punchy caption text.
trending_card.why_unique: Saturated bold label bar and high-contrast punch is tuned for scroll-stopping virality, not editorial restraint.

social_snapshot.name: Social Snapshot
social_snapshot.concept: Quick glance composition designed for instant readability.
social_snapshot.layout_description: Full-bleed photo, one short caption line set simply at the base with no card or panel, fast and unadorned.
social_snapshot.why_unique: Deliberately unadorned and instant to read, distinct from any card, scrim, or structural device.

vertical_storyboard.name: Vertical Storyboard
vertical_storyboard.concept: Sequential vertical panels suggest a multi-beat story in one frame.
vertical_storyboard.layout_description: Canvas divided into two or three stacked horizontal bands of even height, photo spans the tallest band, small numbered tags mark each band.
vertical_storyboard.why_unique: Even horizontal stacking with numbered tags implies a storyboard sequence within a single vertical frame.

ultra_white_space.name: Ultra White Space
ultra_white_space.concept: Extreme breathing room with the photo as a small, deliberate accent.
ultra_white_space.layout_description: Photo occupies a small fraction of the canvas, the vast remainder is a flat pale field, tiny caption set far from the photo.
ultra_white_space.why_unique: The ratio of empty space to photo is deliberately extreme, well beyond a standard mat or margin.

negative_space_focus.name: Negative Space Focus
negative_space_focus.concept: Subject-led minimalism where composition follows the subject's natural space.
negative_space_focus.layout_description: Photo positioned off-centre following its own natural negative space, caption placed precisely within that existing empty area.
negative_space_focus.why_unique: Caption placement is derived from the photo's own negative space rather than a fixed template zone.

single_hero.name: Single Hero
single_hero.concept: One dominant image with nothing competing for attention.
single_hero.layout_description: Full-bleed photo with a single small caption line, no decoration, no scrim, no panel — the photo alone carries the post.
single_hero.why_unique: Zero decorative elements of any kind — the purest possible reduction of the template set.

quiet_luxury.name: Quiet Luxury
quiet_luxury.concept: Understated premium styling that avoids any overt luxury signalling.
quiet_luxury.layout_description: Photo inset with a narrow, precise mat in a neutral tone, one small caption in a restrained thin serif, nothing metallic or bold.
quiet_luxury.why_unique: Deliberately avoids gold, foil, or bold accents — restraint itself is the premium signal.

minimal_geometry.name: Minimal Geometry
minimal_geometry.concept: Simple geometric balance with one precise structural line.
minimal_geometry.layout_description: Photo inset with exactly one fine straight rule positioned using a precise proportional ratio, caption anchored to that single line.
minimal_geometry.why_unique: Only one geometric element exists on the entire canvas, placed with mathematical precision.

premium_border.name: Premium Border
premium_border.concept: Thin elegant framing with a hairline-weight border.
premium_border.layout_description: Photo inset within a very fine single hairline border, generous surrounding mat, small caption centred beneath.
premium_border.why_unique: Border weight is a true hairline (finer than the standard mat treatments), the sole structural element.

signature_frame.name: Signature Frame
signature_frame.concept: Branded edge treatment with a small signature mark at one corner.
signature_frame.layout_description: Photo inset with a fine border, one tiny brand monogram mark sits precisely at a single corner intersection, otherwise unadorned.
signature_frame.why_unique: Brand presence is reduced to one tiny corner mark rather than a watermark, tag, or panel.

elegant_divider.name: Elegant Divider
elegant_divider.concept: Refined section separation using a single delicate rule.
elegant_divider.layout_description: Photo occupies the upper portion, one fine delicate rule separates it from a small caption area below, nothing else added.
elegant_divider.why_unique: The single dividing rule is the only structural device — no border, mat, or panel elsewhere.

precision_layout.name: Precision Layout
precision_layout.concept: Mathematically aligned composition built on a strict proportional system.
precision_layout.layout_description: Photo and caption block are sized and positioned according to a visible golden-ratio-style proportion, no decoration beyond alignment itself.
precision_layout.why_unique: Precision of proportion (not decoration) is the entire visual language of this template.

museum_minimal.name: Museum Minimal
museum_minimal.concept: Gallery-grade simplicity with the quiet confidence of a museum installation.
museum_minimal.layout_description: Photo inset within a generous flat pale field, no border at all, one small caption in a restrained serif placed exactly where a museum wall label would sit.
museum_minimal.why_unique: No border or frame whatsoever — space and placement alone do the work a mat would normally do.
